task_completion.description: Verify the agent checked the original exam to find its start and end times.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the SEB Server interface displaying the details or list view of the 'Introduction to Psychology' exam, specifically showing its start and end times.

task_completion.description: Verify the new exam name is entered correctly in the creation form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exam creation form with 'Introduction to Psychology (Accommodations)' entered into the exam name field.

task_completion.description: Verify the new exam's start and end times match the original exam.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the start and end time fields in the new exam form. They must be filled with the exact same dates and times as the original 'Introduction to Psychology' exam.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct configuration profile is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Accessibility_Profile_v2' selected in the configuration dropdown or selection area of the exam creation form.

task_completion.description: Verify the connection password is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the connection password field in the exam form containing the exact text 'AccommodateMe!'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new exam was successfully saved and appears in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SEB Server exams list or overview page showing the newly created 'Introduction to Psychology (Accommodations)' exam as a saved entry.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the web browser to interact with the SEB Server.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser open to http://localhost:8080 showing the SEB Server GUI. There should be no terminal windows using curl or API requests to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard web UI elements (input fields, dropdowns, buttons) being actively used within the SEB Server interface, rather than the agent typing the answers into a text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that there are no terminal windows open showing MySQL/MariaDB queries inserting the exam directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Exam Name: 'Introduction to Psychology (Accommodations)'. Original Exam Name: 'Introduction to Psychology'. Target Configuration: 'Accessibility_Profile_v2'. Expected Connection Password: 'AccommodateMe!'.
